description: Fix two contributor workflow issues discovered during platform contributor experience testing: (1) format:check fails on clean checkout due to unformatted .ralph/CLAUDE.md, and (2) build-e2e.test.ts shows confusing '1 failed' suite output when e2e-test plugin isn't built.

userStories.title: Add .ralph to .prettierignore so format:check passes on clean checkout
userStories.description: As a platform contributor, I want format:check to pass on a clean checkout so that npm run check succeeds without manual intervention.
acceptanceCriteria: .prettierignore contains a .ralph entry that excludes the entire .ralph/ directory from prettier
npm run format:check passes on a clean checkout without any manual fixes
userStories.notes: The file .ralph/CLAUDE.md is tracked in git but not formatted per Prettier rules. It uses markdown patterns (like `*italic*` instead of `_italic_`, compact numbered lists without blank lines) that Prettier wants to reformat. The .prettierignore file at the repo root already excludes `.ralph/worktrees` but not `.ralph/` itself. The fix is to replace the `.ralph/worktrees` line with just `.ralph` (which covers all ralph infrastructure files including CLAUDE.md, shell scripts, Dockerfile, etc. — none of which should be subject to prettier formatting). File: .prettierignore (repo root), around line 8.

userStories.title: Skip build-e2e.test.ts gracefully when e2e-test plugin is unavailable
userStories.description: As a platform contributor, I want npm run test to show a clean result (no '1 failed' suite) when the e2e-test plugin isn't built, so that I'm not confused by a test suite that appears to fail but exits 0.
acceptanceCriteria: When plugins/e2e-test/node_modules is missing and the plugin can't be built, the build-e2e.test.ts suite is skipped entirely with an informative skip reason (not shown as 'failed')
When the e2e-test plugin IS built, all tests in build-e2e.test.ts run normally
npm run test output shows 0 failed suites when e2e-test plugin is not available
userStories.notes: File: platform/plugin-tools/src/commands/build-e2e.test.ts. The current beforeAll (around line 57-74) tries to npm install and npm run build the e2e-test plugin, and throws an Error if either fails. This causes vitest to show '1 failed' suite with all 9 tests skipped, and vitest exits 0. The thrown error message is 'npm run build in e2e-test plugin failed: Error: tsc succeeded but .../dist/index.js was not created'. The fix: before the install/build attempts, check if the e2e-test plugin directory exists and has a package.json. If npm install or npm run build fails, call describe.skip or use a top-level skip guard (e.g., a boolean flag checked in beforeAll that calls test.skip on each test) instead of throwing. The skip message should say something like 'e2e-test plugin not available (run: cd plugins/e2e-test && npm install && npm run build)'. WARNING: Do NOT change the actual test logic or assertions — only change how the suite handles the missing/unbuildable plugin scenario. The tests themselves are correct and well-tested by the E2E audit script.
